title: DoorDash introduces dual ID verification for alcohol deliveries
text: DoorDash is introducing a new in-app safety measure designed to ensure that alcohol is only delivered to people over the age of 21. The new measure requires the company's delivery people to scan a customer's ID with the DoorDash app to verify their identity before handing off and completing an alcohol delivery.

title: Grubhub Pressures Rivals DoorDash, Uber Eats as Food-Delivery Market Shrinks

title: Amazon takes bite out of Grubhub, offers Prime members free perks
text: Amazon has acquired a 2% stake in Grubhub, the North America-based subsidiary of European food delivery giant Just Eat Takeaway, the Amsterdam-based company announced Wednesday.  Shares of Just Eat (OCTUS: JTKWY) were trading up nearly 20% on the news Wednesday morning, while rival DoorDash's stock (NYSE: DASH) was down about 10%.
